Hair Transplant Clinic Software Turkey 2026 — Patient CRM, WhatsApp Automation & International Payments | MIRAC Technologies

  • ✓ Fixed-price contract
  • ✓ NDA signed on first call
  • ✓ Full IP transfer on delivery
  • ✓ 12-month support SLA
  • ✓ Senior engineers only
  • ✓ 0 missed deadlines in 24 months
We take on a limited number of projects per quarter.
3 spots available for Q3 2026.
Join 30+ companies across 8 countries who trust MIRAC with their critical systems
Home | Contact Us | Related Industry Software | Related Industry Software | Related Industry Software

The problem most hair transplant clinics face: International patients contact via WhatsApp, Instagram, and email simultaneously. Leads get lost. Staff juggle 5 different WhatsApp groups. No one knows which patients had consultations, which paid deposits, which need follow-up calls. Arabic patients, German patients, British patients — all handled manually in different languages. For Istanbul clinics specifically, this is a crisis. Turkey receives over 500,000 medical tourists annually, and hair transplant is the #1 reason they come. The clinics doing the most volume are not the ones with the best surgeons — they are the ones with the best patient management systems. What MIRAC builds for hair transplant clinics: PATIENT CRM — full journey from first WhatsApp message to 12-month post-op follow-up. LEAD CAPTURE — automatic capture from WhatsApp, Instagram DMs, website forms, email. MULTILINGUAL AI — responds to patients in Arabic, German, English, French automatically. BEFORE/AFTER SYSTEM — organized photo

management linked to each patient record. PAYMENT AUTOMATION — collect deposits and balances from international patients. STAFF DASHBOARD — replace WhatsApp groups with a proper coordination system. What clinics see after implementation: 40% increase in lead conversion, 0 lost patient inquiries, 60% reduction in admin time, International patient satisfaction scores up. Starting from $8,000 for single location. Multi-location packages available. Fixed-price. No surprises. Delivered in 6-10 weeks. Languages We Support

Arabic, German, English, French, Russian — these are the 5 main medical tourist nationalities.
